history.note: Fixed residual blockers from SL1a re-audit: user message routing, fallback model allowlist, accumulated budget cap/audit, audit mirror best-effort, NoAllowedModel usage/audit, system prompt hardening, UI spend/cap status. Fugu static audit: PASS. pytest: 24 passed.

Implemented SL1b: schema v5 (kb_chunk, kb_fact, kb_chunk_fts, hardened draft table), KB ingestion for md/txt/csv, FTS5 retrieval (OR terms), draft generation against router with source validation + stale-fact warnings, HITL endpoints (edit only before approval, approve, reject, export-only-if-approved), demo KB fixtures, and minimal React UI. pytest: 37 passed.

Fugu audited all SL1b blockers. Verdict: technically delivered but operationally blocked. Priority: CEO decisions + MWT real data pack. Conditions to open SL2a documented. Blockers and action items stored in report.

Implemented fugu v1 audit fixes: pinned public key + downgrade + pending-mutation check + multi-rollback for auto-update; os.urandom salt + schema-version check + InvalidToken message + business-data verification for backup; stronger HTML injection regex + javascript/data schemes; datetime-aware stale checks + valid_from future blocker + default freshness + undisclosed-hard-fact scan. pytest: 50 passed.

Closed the 3 conditions from fugu v2 PASS-conditional verdict: removed empty-key fallback in update verification, declared cryptography dependency and regenerated uv.lock, added invented-hard-value detection in body_md. Cleaned up dead _is_vigente and fixed rollback version return. pytest: 51 passed.
Fugu final audit: PASS formal. SL1b technical blockers resolved. SL2a remains blocked on CEO decisions and MWT real data pack.

Implemented SL2a/b/c technical baseline: schema v7 (workspace field_aliases_json, parser_version, source_sheet), robust upload endpoint for md/txt/csv/xlsx/pdf, workspace-configurable field aliases, source-label citation validation, stale-fact blockers, drag-and-drop KB upload UI. Added 14 SL2 tests. pytest: 65 passed. Pack MWT real and CEO decisions still pending.

history.phase: SL2b/c · SL3a · SL3b/c · SL3.5 · SL4 · SL5
history.note: Single-pass implementation and integration of SL2b/c, SL3a, SL3b/c, SL3.5, SL4 and SL5 on the local FastAPI/SQLite stack. Fixed remaining failing tests (skill allowlist, routine run HMAC, gold candidate isolation). Final pytest: 112 passed, 1 warning. Codex -p fugu audit completed (harness/reports/AUDIT_FUGU_CODEX_SL3_4_5.md): technically functional but several P0/P1 gaps remain before operational closure. User decided to stay on PLAN_DESARROLLO_SPACELOOM_ETAPA1_v1.md; Foundation Beta migration files were reverted.
